audit_items.proof_trace: All sk_buff allocations in cmsg.c are freed on every execution path. Request skbs are unconditionally consumed by nfp_ccm_communicate (freed on tag error via dev_kfree_skb_any at ccm.c:139, or transmitted via __nfp_app_ctrl_tx at ccm.c:148); reply skbs are freed via dev_kfree_skb_any on all error paths and via nfp_bpf_ctrl_op_cache_put (which unconditionally calls dev_consume_skb_any at L288) on success. The nfp_map->cache skb is freed on invalidation/timeout (cmsg.c:254) and at map teardown (offload.c:415).
